title: OTP
description: A component for OTP input fields with state management and custom styling support. Provides multiple input fields for entering verification codes, PINs, and other numeric sequences with auto-focus, copy-paste support, and keyboard navigation.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: Basic usage of the OTP component with default settings

sections.title: Length
sections.description: Configuring the number of digits in the OTP input

sections.title: Copy Paste
sections.description: Demonstrating copy and paste functionality for OTP input

sections.title: Validation
sections.description: Implementing validation for the OTP input with state management

sections.title: Auto Focus
sections.description: Enabling automatic focus on the first input field

sections.title: Look Variations
sections.description: Different visual styles for the OTP component

sections.title: Validation States
sections.description: Different validation states for the OTP component

sections.title: Disabled & Readonly
sections.description: Control the disabled and readonly states of the OTP component

types.title: AXOtpComponent
types.description: The main component for OTP input with multiple digit support

props.name: type
props.description: The input type for OTP fields. 'number' restricts input to digits only, 'text' allows any character.

props.name: length
props.description: The number of input fields in the OTP component.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the OTP input. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the OTP input is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the OTP input is readonly. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: The visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute for the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates whether the component value has been modified. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: isRequired
props.description: Indicates whether the component has required validation rules. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onCompleted
events.description: Emitted when the OTP input is completed, providing the entered value and completion status.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Detailed value change event with old/new values. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Deprecated: use ngModelChange instead. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires when the component gains focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an internal option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: validationRulesChange
events.description: Emitted when validation rules are added or removed. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: lengthChange
events.description: Emitted when the length property changes.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look style changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the input values to an empty array.

methods.name: mapValueToInputs
methods.description: Converts the value string to input values and updates the inputValues array.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Focuses the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.name: blur
methods.description: Removes focus from the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.name: hasFocus
methods.description: Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.name: resetErrors
methods.description: Resets validation errors. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.name: commitValue
methods.description: Commits a value with optional user interaction flag. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.name: writeValue
methods.description: Writes a value to the component (ControlValueAccessor method). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.name: registerOnChange
methods.description: Registers a change callback function (ControlValueAccessor method). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.name: registerOnTouched
methods.description: Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method). Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.name: setDisabledState
methods.description: Sets the disabled state of the component (ControlValueAccessor method). Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.name: addValidationRule
methods.description: Adds a validation rule. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.name: removeValidationRule
methods.description: Removes a validation rule. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.name: getHostElement
methods.description: Gets the host HTML element of the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.name: setOption
methods.description: Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
